# REQ-FR-260004: Implementation boundary policy for archive reuse and launch integrations

- ID: FR-260004
- Class: FR (Functional Requirement)
- Status: Accepted
- Date: 2026-05-21
- Owner: Repository owner

## Statement

The public Crystord site shall implement archive reuse boundaries that preserve valid brand/media
assets while preventing direct reuse of archive layout systems, and shall launch with minimal
external integrations by default.

## Rationale

The archive is a reference source, not a design system. Explicit boundaries prevent accidental
technology carry-over, reduce stale-copy risk, and keep launch complexity low.

## Acceptance Criteria

- Allowed direct visual reuse is limited to approved brand/media assets and trademark notices.
- Archive layout/styling systems are not directly reused.
- Marketing copy is rewritten for the new site.
- Legal/support copy is reviewed and adapted before publication.
- Launch excludes analytics and external form backends unless explicitly approved later.
  (Analytics approved post-launch via ADR-260012 / BI-260012; form-backend exclusion still stands.)
- Contact uses dedicated contact page plus mailto fallback.
- High-value legacy URLs receive compatibility routes/pages when practical.
